creator: Nakai@Technologist.com
text:
Robert Mills fixed the qvwm port to follow its lastest version
and I tested the patch.
Now qvwm support some Windows 98(beta) features and the title bar
gradation is very nice. See /usr/X11R6/share/doc/qvwm/CHANGE.en for
more infomation.
Please enjoy!

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
diff -ruN qvwm.orig/Makefile qvwm/Makefile
--- qvwm.orig/Makefile	Tue Jun  2 12:22:48 1998
+++ qvwm/Makefile	Fri May 29 07:52:39 1998
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.14 1998/03/05 17:04:12 jfieber Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=       qvwm-1.0b9h
+DISTNAME=       qvwm-1.0b10
 CATEGORIES=     x11
 MASTER_SITES=   http://www-masuda.is.s.u-tokyo.ac.jp/~kourai/qvwm/program/
 
diff -ruN qvwm.orig/files/md5 qvwm/files/md5
--- qvwm.orig/files/md5	Tue Jun  2 12:22:47 1998
+++ qvwm/files/md5	Fri May 29 07:45:59 1998
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (qvwm-1.0b9h.tar.gz) = 462081422e5ef651f65f365509fc7eaa
+MD5 (qvwm-1.0b10.tar.gz) = ac8d6fdbab835955431b738a56500388
